workouts.title: Beginner Full Body
workouts.description: A balanced workout targeting all major muscle groups for overall fitness.

workouts.title: Beginner Upper Body
workouts.description: Focus on chest, back, shoulders and arms for upper body strength.

workouts.title: Beginner Lower Body
workouts.description: Target quads, hamstrings, glutes and calves for stronger legs.

workouts.title: Beginner Core & Abs
workouts.description: Strengthen your core and abdominal muscles for better stability.

workouts.title: Beginner Push Focus
workouts.description: Concentrate on pushing movements for chest, shoulders and triceps.

workouts.title: Beginner Pull Focus
workouts.description: Emphasize pulling movements for back and biceps development.

workouts.title: Beginner Legs & Glutes
workouts.description: Intensive lower body session focused on glutes and leg muscles.

workouts.title: Beginner Cardio Blast
workouts.description: High-energy workout to boost cardiovascular endurance.

workouts.title: Beginner Strength Endurance
workouts.description: Build both strength and stamina with sustained effort exercises.

workouts.title: Beginner Flexibility & Strength
workouts.description: Combine strength training with flexibility work for balanced fitness.

workouts.title: Beginner Chest & Triceps
workouts.description: Dedicated session for building chest and tricep muscles.

workouts.title: Beginner Back & Biceps
workouts.description: Focus on back width and bicep strength through targeted exercises.

workouts.title: Beginner Shoulders & Core
workouts.description: Strengthen shoulders and core for improved posture and stability.

workouts.title: Beginner HIIT Circuit
workouts.description: High-intensity interval training for maximum calorie burn.

workouts.title: Beginner Functional Training
workouts.description: Move better in daily life with functional movement patterns.

workouts.title: Beginner Balance & Stability
workouts.description: Improve balance and joint stability through controlled movements.

workouts.title: Beginner Power Training
workouts.description: Develop explosive power through dynamic strength exercises.

workouts.title: Beginner Mobility Flow
workouts.description: Enhance joint mobility and movement quality through flowing exercises.

workouts.title: Beginner Metabolic Conditioning
workouts.description: Rev up your metabolism with strategic conditioning work.

workouts.title: Beginner Athletic Performance
workouts.description: Train like an athlete with sport-inspired movement patterns.
